case_title: MODRIS A SALZIRNIS et al VS. HENDRY TAHIR

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (DEBTOR PAID JUDGMENT TO COURT) AS TO DEFENDANT TAHIR, HENDRY
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR TRUST TAG NO.22433 BY DEFENDANT TAHIR, HENDRY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALZIRNIS, MODRIS A OCHOA, DAMIAN R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAHIR, HENDRY $2,957.96 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,032.96, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES AN AWARD OF $500.00 FOR PENALTIES PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1950.5 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
